languages.text: Подданные Вольного Торговца просят дозволения провести на мостике благодарственное шествие. Чтобы принять благодарности, следует поговорить с Вигдис.
The Rogue Trader's subjects request permission to hold a gratitude procession upon the bridge. To accept their thanks, you must speak with Vigdis.
languages.original_text: Подданные Вольного Торговца просят дозволения провести на мостике благодарственное шествие. Чтобы принять благодарности, следует поговорить с Вигдис.

traits.locale_text: The Rogue Trader's subjects request permission to hold a gratitude procession upon the bridge. To accept their thanks, you must speak with Vigdis.
The Rogue Trader's subjects request permission to hold a gratitude procession upon the bridge. To accept their thanks, you must speak with Vigdis.
The Rogue Trader's subjects request permission to hold a gratitude procession upon the bridge. To accept their thanks, you must speak with Vigdis.
The Rogue Trader's subjects request permission to hold a gratitude procession upon the bridge. To accept their thanks, you must speak with Vigdis.

languages.text: Los súbditos de{mf|l| la} Comerciante Independiente piden permiso para celebrar una procesión de agradecimiento hasta el puente. Para aceptar su gratitud, habla con Vigdis.
languages.original_text: The Rogue Trader's subjects request permission to hold a gratitude procession upon the bridge. To accept their thanks, you must speak with Vigdis.

traits.locale_text: Los súbditos de{mf|l| la} Comerciante Independiente piden permiso para celebrar una procesión de agradecimiento hasta el puente. Para aceptar su gratitud, habla con Vigdis.

languages.text: 行商浪人的臣民请求准许在舰桥上举行感恩游行。若想接受他们的谢意，你需要与维格迪斯交谈。
languages.original_text: The Rogue Trader's subjects request permission to hold a gratitude procession upon the bridge. To accept their thanks, you must speak with Vigdis.

traits.locale_text: 行商浪人的臣民请求准许在舰桥上举行感恩游行。若想接受他们的谢意，你需要与维格迪斯交谈。

languages.text: Les sujets {mf|du libre-marchand|de la libre-marchande} demandent l'autorisation d'organiser une procession de gratitude sur la passerelle. Adressez-vous à Vigdis pour accéder à leur requête.
languages.original_text: The Rogue Trader's subjects request permission to hold a gratitude procession upon the bridge. To accept their thanks, you must speak with Vigdis.

traits.locale_text: Les sujets {mf|du libre-marchand|de la libre-marchande} demandent l'autorisation d'organiser une procession de gratitude sur la passerelle. Adressez-vous à Vigdis pour accéder à leur requête.

languages.text: Hür Tacir'in tebaası, köprüde bir şükran alayı düzenlemek için izin istiyor. Teşekkürlerini kabul etmek için Vigdis ile konuşmalısın.
languages.original_text: The Rogue Trader's subjects request permission to hold a gratitude procession upon the bridge. To accept their thanks, you must speak with Vigdis.

traits.locale_text: Hür Tacir'in tebaası, köprüde bir şükran alayı düzenlemek için izin istiyor. Teşekkürlerini kabul etmek için Vigdis ile konuşmalısın.

languages.text: 「悪徳トレーダー」の乗客は、感謝の意を表すため、ブリッジで感謝の行進をしたいと許可を求めている。彼らの感謝を受け入れるためには、ヴィグディスと話す必要がある。
languages.original_text: The Rogue Trader's subjects request permission to hold a gratitude procession upon the bridge. To accept their thanks, you must speak with Vigdis.

traits.locale_text: 「悪徳トレーダー」の乗客は、感謝の意を表すため、ブリッジで感謝の行進をしたいと許可を求めている。彼らの感謝を受け入れるためには、ヴィグディスと話す必要がある。

languages.text: Die Untertanen {mf|des Freihändlers|der Freihändlerin} veranstalten auf der Brücke eine Dankesprozession. Du musst mit Vigdis reden, um ihren Dank entgegenzunehmen.
languages.original_text: The Rogue Trader's subjects request permission to hold a gratitude procession upon the bridge. To accept their thanks, you must speak with Vigdis.

traits.locale_text: Die Untertanen {mf|des Freihändlers|der Freihändlerin} veranstalten auf der Brücke eine Dankesprozession. Du musst mit Vigdis reden, um ihren Dank entgegenzunehmen.
